response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with 20 years of broad experience and genuine entrepreneurial credentials through GISCollective, comfortably meeting the tenure floor. However, the role is a director-level individual contributor position requiring recognized AI expertise, strategic customer advisory, and thought leadership at scale. His AI exposure is limited to his current role (April 2025–present) in an implementation capacity, with no demonstrated AI products or platforms built prior to that, no advanced degree in an AI-related field, and no evidence of the executive-facing influence or industry recognition this Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — well above the 15-year minimum requirement
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and the ability to build and sustain a product independently over many years
Current hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows at re:cinq shows active engagement with the AI builder space
concerns: AI experience is nascent and implementation-focused (started April 2025 only), with no established track record of AI products, platforms, or recognized thought leadership in the field
No evidence of director-level IC scope: strategic customer advisory, cross-organizational influence, inspiring engineering communities at scale, or shaping product strategy at an executive level
Educational background is a 2012 BS in Computer Science with no Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is strongly preferred for this seniority and focus area

key_factors.factor: Insufficient AI depth and thought leadership
No director-level strategic or advisory experience
Active AI-agent and agentic workflow work (2025)
